applicability: SwiftUI screens, components, presentation stores, navigation adapters, and hosting integrations.
New SwiftUI features and incremental UIKit-to-SwiftUI migrations.
exception_policy: No exception permits business decisions, product-facing formatting, business dependency construction, unstable identity, or unscoped work in a View; performance exceptions are measured, owned, expiring, and semantics-preserving.
rationale: SwiftUI remains a rendering adapter when product state is display-ready, local state is UX-only, task and identity lifetimes are explicit, and UIKit interoperability preserves semantics.
review_cadence: At least annually, when the supported SwiftUI Observation or navigation model changes, and after a material performance or state-restoration incident.
title: SwiftUI Production
